description: Main learning videos for understanding money calculations including ticket prices, total costs, and making change at the museum

videos.title: Multiplying money amounts - 4th grade math: estimation and word problem
videos.description: Learn how to multiply money amounts to find total costs! If one ticket costs 25 rupees, how much do 4 tickets cost? Practice estimating and solving money word problems like buying museum tickets.
learningObjectives: Count money using rupees and paise
Multiply money amounts to find total cost of multiple tickets
Estimate answers and calculate change when paying with a larger note

questions.question: A child ticket costs 15 rupees and an adult ticket costs 30 rupees. What is the total for 1 child and 1 adult?

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness
